# TradeZella

TradeZella is the #1 trading journal, analytics, and backtesting platform, built by traders for traders. Automatically import trades from 500+ brokers and prop firms, analyze performance with 50+ reports, backtest strategies against 11+ years of historical data, replay trades tick-by-tick, and improve through structured education and mentoring tools. Supports stocks, options, forex, futures, and crypto. Trusted by 50,000+ active traders with 20B+ trades journaled.

## Root URL

- [TradeZella Home](https://www.tradezella.com/home.md) — The #1 trading journal, analytics, and backtesting platform. 50,000+ active traders, 500+ broker and prop firm integrations, 50+ reports, 11+ years of backtesting data. What TradeZella is, who it's for, and what makes it different.

## Products & Features

### Core Platform

- [Trading Journal & Analytics](https://www.tradezella.com/trading-journal.md) — Automatically sync trades from 500+ brokers and prop firms, analyze performance with 50+ reports, customizable dashboard, trade log, daily journal, notebook, and strategy tracking
- [Backtesting](https://www.tradezella.com/backtesting.md) — Validate trading strategies against 11+ years of historical market data across forex, futures, stocks, and crypto with automatic trade journaling and built-in ICT indicators
- [Trade Replay](https://www.tradezella.com/trade-replay.md) — Replay your actual trades tick-by-tick with second-by-second precision, integrated journaling, and Day Replay mode
- [Spaces (Mentor Mode)](https://www.tradezella.com/mentor-mode.md) — Trading mentor software for coaches to monitor student performance, leave targeted feedback on trades, and manage unlimited students from one dashboard
- [Prop Firm Sync](https://www.tradezella.com/prop-firm-sync.md) — Track prop firm finances, monitor evaluations, log payouts, and understand your true ROI across 200+ prop firms with automatic Plaid-powered transaction tracking (coming soon)
- [Strategies](https://www.tradezella.com/strategies.md) — 25+ free ready-made trading strategy templates from verified profitable traders across stocks, options, futures, forex, and crypto

### Learning & Community

- [Zella University](https://www.tradezella.com/university.md) — Free structured trading courses covering introduction to trading, technical analysis, order flow, ICT methodology, and risk management
- [Community](https://www.tradezella.com/community.md) — 20,000+ member Discord community with live backtesting sessions, mentor mode reviews, pre-market prep, and trading psychology webinars

### Overview & Social Proof

- [All Features](https://www.tradezella.com/features.md) — Consolidated feature overview page. Every feature you need to trade better — journaling, analytics, reports, trade replay, notebook, and learning resources. Rated 4.8 on TrustPilot
- [Wall of Love — Testimonials](https://www.tradezella.com/love.md) — Real testimonials from 50,000+ traders worldwide sharing their results, stats, and experiences with TradeZella on social media
- [Changelog — Weekly Updates](https://www.tradezella.com/changelog.md) — Weekly product updates showing new features, improvements, and bug fixes. Public roadmap with community feature voting at trade-zella.upvoty.com

### Blog & Resources

- [Blog](https://www.tradezella.com/blog.md) — Trading education, platform guides, strategy breakdowns, and industry comparisons. Includes TradingView Bar Replay vs. TradeZella, prop firm trading guides, and learning frameworks

### Integrations & Support

- [Supported Brokers](https://www.tradezella.com/brokersupport.md) — 500+ broker and prop firm integrations via auto-sync, file upload, or manual entry. Includes MetaTrader 4/5, NinjaTrader, ThinkorSwim, Interactive Brokers, Tradovate, cTrader, and more
- [Pricing](https://www.tradezella.com/pricing.md) — Basic plan $29/month or Premium plan $49/month (monthly). Essential plan $24/month or Pro plan $33/month (yearly). Full feature breakdown for journaling, analytics, backtesting, trade replay, and mentor mode
- [Contact Us](https://www.tradezella.com/contact-us.md) — Live chat via Intercom, Help Center at help.tradezella.com, Discord community, and email at support@tradezella.com
